---
title: "Macmillan\'s Sunday Library"
---

## Macmillan\'s Sunday Library

**Type:** topic

### About

See Ellen Jordan, ‘“I am too high church and too narrow”; Charlotte Yonge, Macmillan and the Sunday Library.’ <i>Charlotte M Yonge Fellowship Journal</i>. 6 (2003): 12-25.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


*... and 19 more*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
